id.description: The unique identifier for the DMS replication instance.

kms_key_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS encryption key used to encrypt the replication instance.

replication_instance_arn.description: The ARN of the DMS replication instance.

replication_subnet_group_id.description: The ID of the subnet group associated with the replication instance.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A set of VPC security group IDs associated with the replication instance.
